Web links

December 2000
Technology

A curated list of resources and software platforms for intranet development, including NewsEngin, FileMaker Pro, SQL Server, and ColdFusion with their respective website URLs.

For more on Intranet software, check out the following Web sites:

NewsEngin www.newsengin.com. Under "Free Tools," you'll find a link to Tom Torok's tools and handouts from training seminars.

FileMaker Pro www.filemaker.com

SQL Server www.microsoft.com/sql

ColdFusion www.coldfusion.com/products/coldfusion
